title: Volcan du Diable
summary: The Volcan du Diable (French pronunciation: [vɔlkɑ̃ dy djabl], lit. 'Devil's Volcano') is a small mountain of the Kerguelen Islands, located in the central region of the main island of Grande Terre. It reaches the height of 315 metres.
text: The Volcan du Diable (French pronunciation: [vɔlkɑ̃ dy djabl], lit. 'Devil's Volcano') is a small mountain of the Kerguelen Islands, located in the central region of the main island of Grande Terre. It reaches the height of 315 metres.
